arts.ttl: Kyle Bartley 'close' but Carlos Corberan reveals real West Brom target for veteran defender
arts.sum: Normally he should be ready for Preston, the third game we are going to play this week, so he is not going to be ready for this weekend. Kyle Bartley is "very close to returning" to action for West Bromwich Albion - but will not be ready for this weekend's home game with potential promotion rivals Norwich City (3pm).
